Document:
# Tajaran
Tajara are a species of omnivorous, bipedal humanoids with features strongly resembling Terran felines. Their most distinguishing traits include a layer of fur, large ears atop their heads, and a tail that aids in balance. They hail from the icy moon of [color=turquoise]Ahdomai[/color], only relatively recently making their debut on the galactic stage. Originally a clan-centric society, Tajara endured centuries of dictatorial rule. Following a civil war, their government fractured, and power returned to the clans, where it remains to this day.
## Mechanics
## Diet - Can eat raw meat.
## Benefits - Due to their [color=yellow]small stature[/color], they can [color=#1e90ff]fit inside duffel bags[/color]. - Their layer of fur grants them [color=#1e90ff]20% resistance to Cold damage[/color]. - Thanks to their innate agility, they [color=#1e90ff]take reduced damage from impacts or falls[/color]. - Their soft feet allow them to [color=#1e90ff]walk shoeless without making noise[/color]. - They use their [color=yellow]claws[/color] for unarmed attacks, dealing [color=#ec3a3a]Slashing[/color] and [color=#ec3a3a]Piercing[/color] damage.
## Drawbacks - Their [color=yellow]small stature[/color] makes them [color=#ec3a3a]take 15% more Blunt, Slash and Piercing damage[/color]. - Their fur leaves them vulnerable to warmth, causing them to [color=#ec3a3a]take 20% more Heat damage[/color].
